description: An int4 export passes a perplexity check but fails on hard reasoning and long-context inputs.
body: Failure mode: a model is quantized to int4 and accepted on a small perplexity delta, but task accuracy and long-context behavior degrade because low-bit quantization hurts hard cases unevenly. Detection signals: a near-flat perplexity delta alongside a real drop on the task and long-context evals, and user reports of degraded answers on difficult prompts. Do not accept quantization on perplexity alone. Safer fallback: evaluate every precision against full precision on the task and capability evals, set an explicit quality budget, choose the smallest scheme inside it (preferring calibrated/QLoRA-style for low bits), and escalate if none qualifies.
